mapper.sql: SELECT f.id, f.flight_no, f.airline_id, f.departure_airport_id, f.arrival_airport_id, f.departure_time, f.arrival_time, f.duration_minutes, f.base_price, f.remaining_seats, f.total_seats, f.status, f.publish_status, f.direct_flag, f.baggage_allowance, f.punctuality_rate, al.code AS airline_code, al.name AS airline_name, da.code AS departure_airport_code, da.name AS departure_airport_name, da.city AS departure_city, aa.code AS arrival_airport_code, aa.name AS arrival_airport_name, aa.city AS arrival_city FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id

when.test: cabinClass != null and cabinClass != '' and passengerCount != null and passengerCount > 0

choose.when: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM flight_seat fs WHERE fs.flight_id = f.id AND fs.cabin_class = #{cabinClass} AND fs.status = 'AVAILABLE' )

mapper.select: ORDER BY f.departure_time LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight f JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id
WHERE f.id = #{id} AND f.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT id, seat_no, cabin_class, seat_type, price, status, version FROM flight_seat WHERE flight_id = #{flightId} ORDER BY seat_no

SELECT id, flight_no, airline_id, departure_airport_id, arrival_airport_id, departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, base_price, remaining_seats, total_seats, status, publish_status, direct_flag, baggage_allowance, punctuality_rate, created_at, updated_at FROM flight WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flight(flight_no, airline_id, departure_airport_id, arrival_airport_id, departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, base_price, remaining_seats, total_seats, status, publish_status, direct_flag, baggage_allowance, punctuality_rate) VALUES(#{flightNo}, #{airlineId}, #{departureAirportId}, #{arrivalAirportId}, #{departureTime}, #{arrivalTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{basePrice}, #{remainingSeats}, #{totalSeats}, #{status}, #{publishStatus}, #{directFlag}, #{baggageAllowance}, #{punctualityRate})
mapper.update: UPDATE flight SET flight_no = #{flightNo}, airline_id = #{airlineId}, departure_airport_id = #{departureAirportId}, arrival_airport_id = #{arrivalAirportId}, departure_time = #{departureTime}, arrival_time = #{arrivalTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, base_price = #{basePrice}, total_seats = #{totalSeats}, status = #{status}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, direct_flag = #{directFlag}, baggage_allowance = #{baggageAllowance}, punctuality_rate = #{punctualityRate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flight_seat(flight_id, seat_no, cabin_class, seat_type, price, status) VALUES(#{flightId}, #{seatNo}, #{cabinClass}, #{seatType}, #{price}, #{status})

INSERT INTO flight_seat(flight_id, seat_no, cabin_class, seat_type, price, status) VALUES
(#{s.flightId}, #{s.seatNo}, #{s.cabinClass}, #{s.seatType}, #{s.price}, #{s.status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM flight_seat WHERE flight_id = #{flightId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM ticket_order WHERE flight_id = #{flightId}
mapper.update: UPDATE flight SET remaining_seats = remaining_seats - #{count} WHERE id = #{flightId} AND remaining_seats >= #{count}
UPDATE flight SET remaining_seats = remaining_seats + #{count} WHERE id = #{flightId}
UPDATE flight SET remaining_seats = #{count} WHERE id = #{flightId}
UPDATE flight_seat SET status = 'SOLD', version = version + 1 WHERE locked_by_order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'LOCKED'
UPDATE flight_seat SET status = 'AVAILABLE', locked_by_order_id = NULL, lock_expire_time = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE locked_by_order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'LOCKED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight_seat WHERE flight_id = #{flightId}
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight f
WHERE f.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM airline WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM airport WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT cabin_class FROM flight_seat WHERE id IN
#{id}
